item.title: Visual Studio Code vs Visual Studio: Complete 2026 Developer Tool Comparison
item.category: "Development Tools" , "IDE" , "Software Development" , "Programming" , "Code Editors" , "Visual Studio" , "VS Code" , "Microsoft Development" , "Developer Tools" , "Software Engineering"
item.description: Comprehensive 2026 comparison of Visual Studio Code and Visual Studio Community/Professional/Enterprise including features, performance, pricing, and use cases to help developers choose the right IDE.
